line_items.description: Men's knitted sweaters/pullovers, 60% polyester / 40% cotton by weight, crew neck, long sleeve, mixed colors and sizes (S, M, L, XL, XXL). Item style PFI-SWTR-2025.

additional_context: Sweaters are declared under 6110.30 (man-made fiber knit sweaters) but fiber content is 60% polyester/40% cotton. Under HTSUS classification rules, chief weight is polyester (60%), so 6110.30 appears correct. However, importer should verify the specific subheading and whether cotton component affects classification under GRI 3(b). FTC fiber content labeling must accurately reflect 60% polyester, 40% cotton.
